Container.Name: RustDrop
Container.Overview: RustDrop is a self-hosted, lightweight file-sharing portal built in Rust with Yew and Axum. It features drag-and-drop file uploading, file management, and customizable access security.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Location for config files and application state

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional access PIN to lock the file portal. Leave empty for public mode.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom site title rendered in header.

Config.Name: Max File Size
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in Gigabytes (GB).

Config.Name: Max Storage Limit
Config.Description: Total storage limit for all uploaded files combined (in GB).

Config.Name: Retention Period Days
Config.Description: Number of days to retain uploaded files before automatic deletion.
